incident_alpha.title: INCIDENT ALPHA
incident_alpha.description: Connects Door 12 medical, security, and camera evidence into a single reconstructed incident report.

reward.title: INCIDENT ALPHA REPORT
reward.content:
Door 12 was opened before the casualty occurred.

Security records confirm a manual override was accepted at 21:17.
Medical records place the casualty in the Door 12 access corridor at 21:20.
Recovered camera data shows Ethan Hale near Door 12 before the official casualty timestamp.

Conclusion: The official station report was altered.
reward.caption: Auto-generated incident report from connected Door 12 evidence.

notification.detail: A new reconstructed report has been added to the Data Bank.
